title: ledum tomentosum
intro: Ledum tomentosum, also known as the cotton grass or woolly bearberry, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to the Arctic and subarctic regions. It contains various compounds with medicinal properties, including iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ledum tomentosum include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
